title: SubtaskPayload
description: The ONLY channel of information from Coordinator to Subagent. Seeds the subagent's anthropic.messages.create call. Implements FR-001: any field not listed here MUST NOT cross the boundary. additionalProperties:false operationalises spec Edge Case #2 and defends SC-001 / SC-004 (leak-probe).

schema_version.description: Versioning marker required by FR-001. Must match the paired HandoffContract.schema_version.

role_name.description: Names the HandoffContract this payload targets. Subagent selection keys off this field (FR-008).

task_id.description: Unique per spawn. Echoed by SubagentResult.task_id; mismatch is a terminal SubagentResultValidationError (FR-003, FR-004).

instruction.description: The narrow, self-contained instruction for this subtask. MUST NOT contain coordinator transcript content (FR-002).

inputs.description: Declared input fields for the targeted role. Validated against HandoffContract.input_schema at construction (FR-001).

constraints.description: Optional hard rules for this subtask (length limits, forbidden topics). Not a place to smuggle coordinator history.
